## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (golden output regenerated + reviewed if output changed)
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (html-validate + JSON-LD + axe)
- [ ] Determinism preserved (no time/randomness/network in the render path)
- [ ] Engine stays generic (vertical knowledge lives in a pack)
- [ ] Demo data is fictional (no real business names, phones, or addresses)
